chapter_title: Size, Weight and Load of Implements of Husbandry
text: The provisions of Section 21715 do not apply to any vehicle drawing or towing unladen implements of husbandry.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 16. IMPLEMENTS OF HUSBANDRY [36000 - 36800]
### Chapter 6. Size, Weight and Load of Implements of Husbandry [36600 - 36627]
##### § 36625

The provisions of Section 21715 do not apply to any vehicle drawing or towing unladen implements of husbandry.

*(Added by Stats. 1963, Ch. 2149.)*

subsections.text: The provisions of Section 21715 do not apply to any vehicle drawing or towing unladen implements of husbandry.
